note: STAGED C++ gold fixture. Self-contained (own root) so it does NOT load via the Perl run.pl. Running it needs: (1) a --features cpp binary (run.pl uses the default perl-only release), and (2) it bypasses the CPAN substrate check (self-contained root, no Perl deps). The fixture FORMAT + expect-substring assertions are reused verbatim; a small cpp-gold runner (or a run.pl extension that picks the cpp binary + skips the substrate gate for rows with their own root) is the integration step. Authored from `perl-lsp --outline gold-corpus/cpp-fixture/sample.cpp`.
